Index.title: Growth is a <system>System</system>, not a Tactic.
Index.subtitle: ODC is a strategic consulting firm that designs and activates growth systems. We are architects of the model, integrating strategy, technology, and execution.

Services.title: Consulting <services>Services</services>
Services.subtitle: Tailored solutions designed to unlock growth, transformation, and new business opportunities.
Services.strategicGrowthDesc: We help companies and leaders define and activate growth strategies, combining strategic vision with execution to expand market share and strengthen long-term competitiveness.
Services.digitalTransformationDesc: We drive organizational transformation, change management, and innovation through digital and cognitive technologies to enable adaptive organizations and intelligent operations.
Services.brandStrategyDesc: We build powerful brands and marketing strategies through integrated marketing, data-driven strategy, and consumer-centric narratives for lasting market leadership and growth.
Services.innovationEcosystemsDesc: We design and implement platforms powered by innovation and collaboration to build scalable digital ecosystems, accelerate growth, and unlock new market opportunities.
Services.storytellingDesc: We help leaders and teams build clear and persuasive narratives, pitches, and presentations that inspire, align, and mobilize audiences toward action.

Insights.title: Strategic <insights>Insights</insights>
Insights.subtitle: Systems thinking and conceptual frameworks for digital leaders.

Contact.title: Let's talk about <systems>Systems</systems>.
Contact.subtitle: We design growth models that work. Complete the form to start a strategic conversation.

Team.title: Strategic <partners>Leadership</partners>
Team.andresBio: Industrial Engineer, specialist in Strategic Marketing and AD@IPADE. More than 20 years leading marketing, growth, and innovation in consumer, technology, and startups in Latin America.
Team.tuyoBio: Cognitive Innovation strategist, mentor, and speaker. More than 20 years driving cultural transformation, leadership, and AI-based innovation in organizations.

Juntas.title: Advisory for <highlight>Boards of Directors</highlight>
Juntas.subtitle: Advanced strategic accompaniment for boards and executive committees.
Juntas.value1Desc: Alignment of technology and strategy for board-level decisions.
Juntas.value2Desc: Adoption of AI and advanced models from top leadership.
Juntas.value3Desc: Structuring long-term resilience and expansion models.
